input.instruction: Assess whether the evidence package has the gap this pattern describes. If the package is complete for this COU, the correct disposition is to accept — do NOT over-act on an alarming-looking but adequately-addressed signal. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge.

fired_pattern.definition: A constraint residual exists in a region; QoI-sensitivity to that region is characterized.
fired_pattern.standard_anchor: ASME V&V 40 model-form + sensitivity; proto-taxonomy D-PD-04

case_context.cou: the near-field QoI feeds a flame-stability decision
case_context.decision_consequence: stability margin from the near-field QoI

answer_key.gold_mechanism: The 4% residual is confined to the far-field outlet, and a documented sensitivity study shows the COU's near-field QoI barely depends on that region; the constraint violation is real but off the QoI's dependency path, so it does not defeat this use.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

parameters.justification: residual is confined to a region the COU QoI is documented insensitive to

forbidden_claims: demands reconciliation of a residual the QoI is documented insensitive to (over-action)
treats any constraint residual as an automatic defeater regardless of QoI sensitivity

hardness.obvious_signal: a species-conservation residual (4%) is present — a constraint violation
hardness.conflicting_signal: the residual sits entirely in the far-field outlet region, and a documented sensitivity study shows the COU's QoI (near-field flame position) has negligible dependence on that region — the violation is real but off the QoI's dependency path

label_provenance.external_grounding: ASME V&V 40 model-form + sensitivity: a constraint residual off the QoI's dependency path (per a documented sensitivity study) is accounted-for; acting on it is over-action.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
